Sidebar.patientsDescription: Clinic census and patient workflow queue.
Sidebar.wardMapDescription: Interactive room layout and patient bed placement board.
Sidebar.visitDescription: Mobile rounds cards and A4 visit-sheet printing.
Sidebar.settingsDescription: Tenant preferences, conventions, and clinic setup.

WardMap.title: Ward map
WardMap.selectOrganization: Select a clinic organization to load the interactive ward layout.
WardMap.noLayoutDescription: Build the room list first so the map can generate droppable bed slots.
WardMap.heroDescription: Drag patient cards into empty beds for immediate local feedback while the updated placement is saved back to Convex in the background.
WardMap.placementDescription: Drag from here when a patient does not already match a generated bed ID.
WardMap.placementEmpty: All patients are currently placed into configured beds.

toasts.missingContext: Select an organization and sign in before moving patients.
